task_completion.description: Navigate to the Lookup Lists section in HospitalRun Administration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HospitalRun web interface is visible, specifically showing the 'Lookup Lists' or system configuration page.

task_completion.description: Add 'Orthopedic Consultation' to the Visit Types list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Orthopedic Consultation' is visible within the 'Visit Types' list or its corresponding input field.

task_completion.description: Add 'Orthopedics Wing B' to the Visit Location List.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Orthopedics Wing B' is visible within the 'Visit Location List' or its corresponding input field.

task_completion.description: Add 'Dr. Sarah Mitchell' to the Physician List.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Dr. Sarah Mitchell' is visible within the 'Physician List' or its corresponding input field.

task_completion.description: Ensure all added lookup list values are saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Saved', 'Success') is visible, or the final screenshot shows the updated lists with the new values present and no active/unsaved state indicators.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the HospitalRun graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser displaying the HospitalRun application, not a terminal window executing database or API commands.

integrity.description: The agent entered the data into the actual HospitalRun application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The input fields containing the target values belong to the HospitalRun web page, not a separate text editor, notepad, or script file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open and being used to inject the target strings directly into the page HTML.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The exact values that must be added are: 'Orthopedic Consultation' for Visit Types, 'Orthopedics Wing B' for Visit Location List, and 'Dr. Sarah Mitchell' for Physician List.
